Our Essence

More than just
a coffee shop.

Atelier Coffee was born from a passion for architecture and the perfect brew. We've transformed an industrial space into a warm, inviting workshop for the senses.

Every corner is designed for conversation, creativity, and the appreciation of specialty beans sourced from the finest Indonesian plantations.

The Selection

Curated Favorites

Hand-picked by our baristas and chefs to satisfy your refined palate.

Hot Cappuccino

Rp 35k

Creamy texture with a bold espresso base and perfect micro-foam.

Artisan Fries

Rp 28k

Hand-cut potatoes seasoned with our signature spice blend and truffle oil.

Flaky Pastry

Rp 42k

Buttery, multi-layered French croissant baked fresh every morning.
